component.name: Hyprland Settings
component.summary: Review and safely edit supported Hyprland settings

description.p: Hyprland Settings is a GTK/libadwaita application for browsing official Hyprland setting metadata, reviewing the active config layout, and applying guarded safe-batch writes for eligible normal scalar settings.

The app backs up files before writing, checks the result after writing, and keeps high-risk, display/render-risk, generated, script-managed, symlink/current-profile, duplicate, missing/default, structured-family, runtime, and profile/mode targets blocked until separate safety designs are ready.
The bundled metadata targets Hyprland 0.55.2. This app is not an official Hyprland project.

Release candidate: runtime-first live preview with supervised dead-man recovery, Safe Live Save Mode gating every save, gated single-write persistence with byte-exact backups and reread verification, a structured-family record picker for proven animation and bezier record shapes, and a Hyprland 0.55.4 zero-drift compatibility audit.
First release: read-only browsing of official Hyprland setting metadata with guarded safe-batch config writes for eligible normal scalar settings.
